content: After core slimming Phase 1 moved doc generation (createDocSearchIndex, generateCapabilityDoc, renderCapabilityDoc) from @linchkit/core/server to @linchkit/devtools, dependent packages must update their imports and add @linchkit/devtools to dependencies. Outbox worker flaky test fixed by increasing poll wait from 50ms to 150ms.

Unit test patterns for core modules: validation-engine uses ProposalChange fixtures; health-check/graceful-shutdown use silent logger to suppress console noise; response-cache LRU tests need setTimeout delays (≥5ms) between set/get operations to ensure distinct lastAccessedAt timestamps; table-registry tests use real generateDrizzleTable calls. All tests use bun:test with no external mocks.
